form.formComment: Didn't do much last start, 8th (Fr1) over 1690m at Shepparton was 6th-12.18 at the bell, beaten 16 m by Settle The Bill (2:06.20) in NR up to 49 on March 17 at $71. Before that was well back in the run when 6th (Fr6) over 1650m after being wide early at Bendigo was 7th-11.34 at the bell, beaten 5 m by Christmas Babe (2:05.10) in NR up to 39 on March 11 at $4.40. Cannot enthuse.

form.formComment: Last start good run when 3rd (Fr3) over 2150m at Bendigo, beaten 8 m by Jackies Gift (2:42.10) in NR up to 49 on March 25 at $14. Two runs back ran on from midfield and posted a big 9 m win (Fr2) at Bendigo (2:44.90) beating Playa Del Carmen in NR up to 37 on March 18 at $9 at the bell was 4th-2.61. Contender.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Weakened inside the final 700m to be beaten 61m.
Out of position at the start despite the efforts of its driver.
Slowly away from the mobile barrier start.

form.formComment: Last start 10th (Fr7) over 1690m at Maryborough, beaten 65 m by Settle The Bill (2:06.10) in NR 48 to 52 on April 10 at $81. At the run before 6th (Sr1) over 1690m at Maryborough, beaten 40 m by Ai Sedhai (2:05.50) in NR 42 to 47 on March 30 at $5. Draws for a better showing.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Pulled hard early stages before breaking gait at the 1300m.
Over raced throughout the middle stages.

form.formComment: Last start 5th (Fr2) over 1690m at Maryborough, at the bell was 6th-12.5 beaten 17 m by Settle The Bill (2:06.10) in NR 48 to 52 on April 10 at $26. At the start before 9th (Fr1) over 2240m at Melton, beaten 85 m by Rakero Warrior (2:47.50) in NR 50 to 55 on March 20 at $101. May do better.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start 5th (Fr2) over 1690m at Maryborough, at the bell was 6th-12.5 beaten 17 m by Settle The Bill (2:06.10) in NR 48 to 52 on April 10 at $26. previousStarts.stewardsComment: Tired to be beaten 86.7m into ninth and last placing.
Shied and broke gait nearing the 500m point.

form.formComment: Solid run when a close second behind Wallis at Bendigo over 2150m in a No NR on March 25 at $15. Then a handy effort when beaten by 5.5 m finishing third after a quick start, behind Manda Kyvalley at Maryborough over 1690m in a NR 42 to 47 on March 30 at $2.60. Can continue the strong form.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Last start was well beaten into seventh behind Jilliby Topgun at Echuca over 1755m in a NR up to 42 on April 5 at $1.80. Raced better the start before that with a solid effort when 2nd (Fr2) over 2150m after showing early speed at Bendigo beaten 3 m by Jackies Gift (2:42.10) in NR up to 49 on March 25 at $7.50. Consider.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Held up for clear running rounding the final turn.
Tightened approaching the home turn to receive the bell.

form.formComment: Last start broke in score up and was out of position at the start 7th (Fr3) over 2150m at Bendigo beaten 45 m by Kyvalley Anthony (2:40.40) in NR 42 to 47 on April 8 at $10. Two runs back 7th (Fr3) over 2190m at Maryborough beaten 22 m by Mielicki (2:45.90) in NR 46 to 50 on January 4 at $31. Likely improver.

Inconvenienced behind the tiring Kyvalley Anthony rounding the final turn.
